expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
expectations.evidence: No knowledge of ecosystem.env. Suggested editing ~/.zshrc directly.

expectations.text: Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_TOKEN or similar)
expectations.evidence: Used NOTION_TOKEN which matches the expected variable name.

expectations.text: Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
expectations.evidence: Did not describe sourcing a separate env file. Suggested putting the export directly in ~/.zshrc.

expectations.text: Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
expectations.evidence: Explicitly recommended adding the export line to ~/.zshrc.

expectations.text: Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable
expectations.evidence: No mention of any example file.
